A '''battle''' at [[Ixtlar/Legends|Ixtlar]] was one of several taking place between the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic's]] [[Victory Fleet]] and the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatist's]] [[Bulwark Fleet]]. The battle was inconclusive as the Bulwark Fleet remained a threat, forcing the Victory Fleet to pursue it further.

{{Battle-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
Though the chronology is understood, the precise date of the battle is somewhat unclear, as ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' bases its dates on a 12-month year instead of the [[Galactic Standard Calendar]], describing the [[Foerost campaign]] as taking place in "[[20 BBY/Legends|20.1 B.B.Y.]] (1 year, 11 months after the [[First Battle of Geonosis/Legends|Battle of Geonosis]])".<ref name="TNEC" />
